ns0:entry.ns0:title: DataExpert-io/data-engineer-handbook
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DataExpert-io/data-engineer-handbook
Language: jupyter-notebook
This is a repo with links to everything you'd ever want to learn about data engineering

ns0:entry.ns0:title: DataTalksClub/data-engineering-zoomcamp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DataTalksClub/data-engineering-zoomcamp
Language: jupyter-notebook
Data Engineering Zoomcamp is a free 9-week course on building production-ready data pipelines. The next cohort starts in January 2026. Join the course here 👇🏼

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Marktechpost/AI-Agents-Projects-Tutorials
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Marktechpost/AI-Agents-Projects-Tutorials
Language: jupyter-notebook
Multi-agent systems, memory, planning, reasoning loops

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NVIDIA/accelerated-computing-hub
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NVIDIA/accelerated-computing-hub
Language: jupyter-notebook
NVIDIA curated collection of educational resources related to general purpose GPU programming.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: PacktPublishing/30-Agents-Every-AI-Engineer-Must-Build
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/PacktPublishing/30-Agents-Every-AI-Engineer-Must-Build
Language: jupyter-notebook
30 Agents Every AI Engineer Must Build, published by Packt

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Pierian-Data/Complete-Python-3-Bootcamp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Pierian-Data/Complete-Python-3-Bootcamp
Language: jupyter-notebook
Course Files for Complete Python 3 Bootcamp Course on Udemy

ns0:entry.ns0:title: SakanaAI/AI-Scientist
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/SakanaAI/AI-Scientist
Language: jupyter-notebook
The AI Scientist: Towards Fully Automated Open-Ended Scientific Discovery 🧑‍🔬

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ageron/handson-mlp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ageron/handson-mlp
Language: jupyter-notebook
A series of Jupyter notebooks that walk you through the fundamentals of Machine Learning and Deep Learning in Python using Scikit-Learn, PyTorch, and Hugging Face libraries.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: chiphuyen/aie-book
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/chiphuyen/aie-book
Language: jupyter-notebook
[WIP] Resources for AI engineers. Also contains supporting materials for the book AI Engineering (Chip Huyen, 2025)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dusty-nv/jetson-containers
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dusty-nv/jetson-containers
Language: jupyter-notebook
Machine Learning Containers for NVIDIA Jetson and JetPack-L4T

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ed-donner/agents
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ed-donner/agents
Language: jupyter-notebook
Repo for the Complete Agentic AI Engineering Course

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ed-donner/llm_engineering
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ed-donner/llm_engineering
Language: jupyter-notebook
Repo to accompany my mastering LLM engineering course

ns0:entry.ns0:title: greyhatguy007/Machine-Learning-Specialization-Coursera
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/greyhatguy007/Machine-Learning-Specialization-Coursera
Language: jupyter-notebook
Contains Solutions and Notes for the Machine Learning Specialization By Stanford University and Deeplearning.ai - Coursera (2022) by Prof. Andrew NG

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/ML-For-Beginners
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/ML-For-Beginners
Language: jupyter-notebook
12 weeks, 26 lessons, 52 quizzes, classic Machine Learning for all

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/generative-ai-for-beginners
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/generative-ai-for-beginners
Language: jupyter-notebook
21 Lessons, Get Started Building with Generative AI

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/mcp-for-beginners
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/mcp-for-beginners
Language: jupyter-notebook
This open-source curriculum introduces the fundamentals of Model Context Protocol (MCP) through real-world, cross-language examples in .NET, Java, TypeScript, JavaScript, Rust and Python. Designed for developers, it focuses on practical techniques for building modular, scalable, and secure AI workflows from session setup to service orchestration.
